name: Andela Tech Talent Platform REST API
what_it_does: Andela tech talent marketplace REST API for enterprises to source, match, and manage vetted software engineers and technical talent from Africa, Latin America, and beyond — enabling AI agents to automate talent requests, track matching status, manage team engagements, and integrate with procurement and HRIS systems through Andela's enterprise tech talent platform. Enables AI agents to manage talent request management for technical talent requirement definition and sourcing request automation, handle matching management for engineer recommendation, profile review, and selection automation, access engagement management for active team member onboarding and contract lifecycle automation, retrieve performance management for team member performance tracking and engagement review automation, manage billing management for talent billing and invoice processing automation, handle team management for distributed engineering team composition and reporting automation, access skills management for technical skill profiling and certification tracking automation, retrieve availability management for engineer availability calendar and allocation automation, manage communication management for client-engineer communication and onboarding automation, and integrate Andela with HRIS, procurement, and engineering management platforms for enterprise tech talent automation.
use_cases: Sourcing vetted software engineers from Andela's Africa/LatAm network for technical staffing automation agents
Managing distributed engineering team engagements and tracking delivery for workforce automation agents
Integrating Andela talent requests with enterprise procurement for compliant contingent workforce automation agents
Reporting on distributed team performance and utilization for engineering leadership automation agents
not_for: Full-time employee hiring and relocation (Andela is remote contract talent; LinkedIn and Greenhouse serve FTE hiring)
Non-technical talent (Andela specializes in software engineering talent; Catalant and Toptal serve broader professional expertise)
Short-term task-based work (Andela is ongoing team engagement model; Upwork serves task-based freelance work)
best_when: An enterprise engineering or technical team wanting AI agents to source and manage vetted remote software engineers from Andela's Africa and Latin America talent network for distributed team engagements.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE AGREEMENT IS REQUIRED: Andela serves enterprise clients; automated public-marketplace assumption creates access_restricted for organizations without Andela enterprise agreement; automated must have Andela enterprise account. TALENT MATCHING INVOLVES HUMAN CURATION: Andela talent matching combines AI screening with human curation by Andela talent team; automated instant-match assumption creates turnaround_delay for matching timelines involving Andela's vetting process; automated must account for Andela talent team involvement in matching. API ACCESS IS ENTERPRISE INTEGRATION FEATURE: Andela API access is an enterprise integration feature, not public developer API; automated open-API assumption creates access_denied for organizations expecting public API without enterprise agreement; automated must negotiate API access as enterprise integration. TIMEZONE AND COMMUNICATION PLANNING IS REQUIRED: Andela engineers may be in Africa (UTC+1 to UTC+3) or LatAm; automated same-timezone assumption creates collaboration_gap for distributed teams not accounting for timezone overlap in planning; automated must plan for asynchronous work patterns in distributed team design.

auth.notes: Andela uses OAuth2 for Tech Talent REST API. REST API with JSON. New York, NY HQ. Founded 2014 by Jeremy Johnson, Christina Sass, Brice Nkengsa, Ian Carnevale, Iyin Aboyeji. Raised $380M+. Backed by SoftBank, Generation Investment, Chan Zuckerberg Initiative. Products: Andela Talent Cloud (marketplace), Andela Assessments, Andela Teams. 175,000+ vetted engineers across 100+ countries (focus: Africa, LatAm). 200+ enterprise clients. Competes with Toptal, Crossover, and Turing for global remote tech talent.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier; enterprise agreement required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-engineer monthly fee; talent platform fee plus engineer rates; enterprise volume pricing
pricing.notes: New York NY. $380M raised. SoftBank backed. 175,000+ vetted engineers. Per-engineer monthly pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; enterprise agreement defines API access levels

known_agent_gotchas: TALENT MATCHING HAS TURNAROUND TIME: Andela talent matching involves human curation; automated instant-match assumption creates workflow_wait for talent requests requiring Andela talent team review (typically 3-5 business days); automated must design talent request workflows with matching turnaround time built in

ASSESSMENT RESULTS ARE CENTRAL TO MATCHING: Andela engineers have skill assessment scores; automated profile-only assumption creates skill_mismatch for talent selection not considering Andela assessment results; automated must consider assessment scores in talent evaluation

TIMEZONE OVERLAP IS CRITICAL FOR TEAM DESIGN: Andela engineer locations affect timezone overlap for collaboration; automated location-agnostic assumption creates collaboration_friction for teams not planning for Africa/LatAm timezone overlap; automated must include timezone requirements in talent requests

ENGAGEMENT ONBOARDING REQUIRES COORDINATION: Andela engineer onboarding requires client system access provisioning and team introduction; automated instant-productive assumption creates onboarding_delay for engagements not accounting for 1-2 week onboarding period; automated must schedule onboarding workflow after engineer selection

BILLING IS MONTHLY NOT HOURLY: Andela charges monthly team fees rather than hourly billing; automated hourly-billing assumption creates invoice_mismatch for billing integrations expecting hourly rate invoicing; automated must handle Andela's monthly billing model in AP integration
agent_readiness.security_notes: Tech talent platform. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US. Engineer profiles and engagement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Tech talent marketplace. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US. Engineer profiles and distributed team data.
